calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Property As Asset Of Trust, Terminating Further Estate Proceedings, Discharging Personal Rep Of Estate & Bond
Off Calendar Dec-22-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeffrey Antonchuk for Debra Dolch (Petitioner).

Mr. Antonchuk reported on the status of the Taiwan property stating that none of the Beneficiaries signed the consents and that their efforts were unfruitful. In addition, he stated that he had no legal basis on which to rule on the abandonment of the Taiwan property, that the Court had no jurisdiction over the property in Taiwan and that it was more about carrying out the wishes of the trust. The Court stated that everything was in order and that the supplemental declaration had been reviewed. The Court granted the petition confirming the Illinois property. The Court terminated the probate proceeding based on lack of assets. The Personal Representative is discharged, the bond is exonerated and the trust is terminated. The request for attorney's fees and the Successor Trustee's fees were granted.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.
